subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-08
subcodes.first_line: I have been with visitors all the morning... Here one must always be with visitors... I am caught among different nations and all refer their cases to me
subcodes.subjects: @diversity of thought and belief, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @material and spiritual existence; two books
